title: Simple Lobby Proxy
description: Simple and easy Velocity Proxy Plugin to easily go to your Lobby server with one command!
body:
**It's finally here!**
**An easy to use VELOCITY/BungeeCord Plugin to easier setup _/lobby_ Commands!**
**On every Backend Server is the _/lobby_ Command Available!**

🛠️**Install:**

- **Only install it on your Proxy Server _NOT_ the Backend Servers!**


- **1.16.x - 1.21.x for Velocity and BungeeCord!**
- **Big and more Updates coming out soon!**
